prompt: Photorealistic cozy late-night bedroom portrait of a gorgeous Korean woman lounging on her bed, casually facing the camera with a calm, sleepy look. Romantic slice-of-life mood, feminine cozy aesthetic, intimate late-night atmosphere, shallow depth of field, cinematic framing, highly detailed photorealism, soft warm glow, DSLR-style photography, luxury lifestyle editorial feel, calming nighttime ambiance.
